summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a fiery first Turn on Your Lovelight and an incredible Alligator jam.
review: The performance is highlighted by a ripping first turn of "Turn On Your Lovelight" featuring Pigpen and Jerry, followed by a phenomenally free‑form, high‑energy rendition of "Alligator" that many reviewers call one of the great early jams.  The recording, identified as an SBD (soundboard) source, is praised for its clarity with no noted defects, though listeners are advised to use EQ for optimal playback.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers give 5‑star ratings, consistently praising both the musical performance and the audio quality; weighting favors the show (70%) and recording (30%), resulting in an almost perfect score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No audible flaws mentioned; reviewers suggest using EQ for best results, indicating a clean, well‑balanced capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set opens with a businesslike but powerful "Turn On Your Lovelight" that builds momentum into an expansive, psychedelic "Alligator" jam, showcasing tight ensemble work.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as tearing up the place and delivering stellar guitar work during Lovelight.
